A.evidence: Clean faithful prose through p5 top, zero garbling or cruft. Full LaTeX math with \mathcal/\mathbf and numbered display eqs (1)(2) via \tag. Perfect reading order; footnote handled inline; cleanly omits the Fig.3 architecture dump. Only minus: plain-text headings (no markdown) and no figure captions/placeholders. No tables reached (neutral).

B.evidence: Faithful prose, good LaTeX with numbered eqs. But structure marred by ~110 lines transcribing the Fig.3 VGG-19/plain/residual architecture as vertical arrow lists (lines 122-235) and fragmented Fig.2 into stray token lines (32-47). No tables reached (neutral).

C.evidence: Cleanest overall: faithful prose, proper markdown headings, figure captions in place, footnotes well placed, no figure-dump noise. Full LaTeX math with \mathcal/\mathbf and numbered eqs (1)(2). Ends mid-p5 (cut at 'validation imag'). No tables reached (neutral).

D.evidence: Garbled/duplicated author block dropped into the middle of the abstract with 'Keating He' misspelling (lines 8-17). No LaTeX: inline math is plain spaced symbols ('H(x)', 'W 2 σ(W 1 x)'), eqs only inline with (1)(2). Plain headings, footnote inserted mid-text. No tables reached (neutral).

E.evidence: Faithful prose and clean markdown/image placeholders, but math is the weak point: both display equations (1) and (2) are dropped as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->' and inline math is degraded spaced symbols. Author 'Jian Sun' misplaced mid-intro (line 37); & entities. No tables reached (neutral).

F.evidence: Faithful prose and excellent LaTeX math with numbered eqs via \tag. Cluttered by heavy reference-link cruft '[\[41\]](#page-8-0)' and scattered '<span id=...>' anchors that reduce cleanliness though remain parseable. Reading order fine. No tables reached (neutral).

G.evidence: Clean faithful prose and good inline LaTeX for eqs (1)(2) through line 75, then a catastrophic repetition loop: 'pool size: 128' repeated hundreds of times (Fig.3 dump degenerated, line 77) destroying the tail. Plain headings; 'imageNet' lowercase glitch. No tables reached (neutral).

H.evidence: Faithful prose, authors correct, clean markdown headings, image placeholders and figure captions in place, good reading order. Math partially degraded: display eqs kept as LaTeX but missing eq numbers, inline degraded with spaced symbols and odd 'W$\_{i}$' subscript escaping. & entities. No tables reached (neutral).
